fields.name: Leeds City Council
fields.sustainability_mission: Pioneering the 'Circular Yorkshire' initiative to eliminate waste from construction by 2035 through mandatory material passports.

fields.name: Manchester City Council
fields.sustainability_mission: To become a zero-carbon city by 2038, prioritizing the retrofitting of social housing and the electrification of all public transport.

fields.name: Bristol City Council
fields.sustainability_mission: Integrating nature into the urban fabric. Our mandate requires a 10% Biodiversity Net Gain on every single procurement contract.

fields.name: Nottingham City Council
fields.sustainability_mission: Leading the UK with our Carbon Neutral 2028 pledge, focusing on district heating networks powered by waste-to-energy technology.

fields.name: Newcastle City Council
fields.sustainability_mission: Revitalizing the River Tyne corridor through blue-green infrastructure projects that combine flood defense with public leisure spaces.

fields.name: Camden Council
fields.sustainability_mission: Reducing the embodied carbon of London's built environment by prioritizing refurbishment and retrofit over demolition.

fields.name: Cardiff Council
fields.sustainability_mission: One Planet Cardiff: Transforming our energy, transport, and food systems to safeguard the well-being of future generations.

fields.name: Glasgow City Council
fields.sustainability_mission: Building on the COP26 legacy by investing in large-scale renewable heat networks and massive urban re-greening projects.
